_template_note: This is a reference template. Copy it to setting/run_config.json before running.
Fields starting with '_' are documentation only and are ignored by the program.
The real runnable config is the top-level fields after _help_by_section.
Keep API keys out of this file. Put private values in setting/api_env.sh.

_quick_start.local_mode: Set mode=local, then fill answer, submissions, optional roster, and output_dir.
_quick_start.canvas_mode: Set mode=canvas, then fill answer plus canvas_course_id/canvas_assignment_id. Put CANVAS_API_TOKEN in setting/api_env.sh.

01_mode_and_files.mode: local uses local files; canvas downloads/uploads through Canvas.
01_mode_and_files.answer: Reference-answer PDF path. Required unless answer_key_json is provided.
01_mode_and_files.submissions: Student ZIP/folder/single PDF. Used only in local mode.
01_mode_and_files.roster: Optional xlsx/csv roster for student id/name matching.
01_mode_and_files.output_dir: Output directory for workbooks, JSON cache, and diagnostics. Default recommendation: output.
01_mode_and_files.answer_key_json: Optional extracted answer-key JSON. Skips AI answer extraction.
01_mode_and_files.refresh_answer_key: true forces re-extracting the answer key even if output_dir has answer_key.json.

02_ai_provider.backend: chat-vision renders PDFs to images; responses sends PDFs directly to Responses API.
02_ai_provider.model: Model name. Prefer setting AI_GRADER_MODEL in setting/api_env.sh.
02_ai_provider.api_key: Do not put secrets here. Prefer AI_GRADER_API_KEY in setting/api_env.sh.
02_ai_provider.base_url: OpenAI-compatible endpoint. Prefer AI_GRADER_BASE_URL in setting/api_env.sh.
02_ai_provider.api_timeout: AI API timeout per request, in seconds.
02_ai_provider.api_max_retries: OpenAI SDK retry count. 0 avoids long stalls on failed requests.
02_ai_provider.trust_env: Whether httpx reads proxy/TLS env vars. false is usually better for school/local endpoints.

03_pdf_rendering.render_dpi: Image DPI for chat-vision. Higher is clearer but slower and more token-heavy.
03_pdf_rendering.max_render_pages: Maximum pages sent per student PDF in chat-vision mode.
03_pdf_rendering.render_timeout: PDF rendering timeout per submission, in seconds.
03_pdf_rendering.no_chat_json_mode: true disables response_format=json_object for providers that do not support it.

04_scoring.point_mode: total means regular_points/bonus_points are total pools; per-question means each question max.
04_scoring.review_threshold: Confidence below this value is flagged for manual review.
04_scoring.review_zero_scores: true flags zero-score questions for review.
04_scoring.blank_review_scores: true leaves reviewed students blank in the clean grade workbook.

05_speed_and_resume.max_pdfs: Maximum new submissions to grade in this run. Existing reusable results do not count.
05_speed_and_resume.requests_per_minute: Local request-count limiter. This does not limit token/minute.
05_speed_and_resume.resume: true reuses successful existing results and reruns failed/timeout/unreadable ones.

06_output_and_debug.output_profile: compact keeps essential files; full keeps extra markdown/json diagnostics.
06_output_and_debug.analysis_max_students: Maximum students used in AI class analysis.
06_output_and_debug.dry_run_discover: true only checks input discovery and does not call AI.
06_output_and_debug.verbose: true prints per-file render/API diagnostic logs.

07_canvas_only.canvas_token: Do not put secrets here. Prefer CANVAS_API_TOKEN in setting/api_env.sh.
07_canvas_only.canvas_course_id: Canvas course id. Required in canvas mode.
07_canvas_only.canvas_assignment_id: Canvas assignment id. Required in canvas mode.
07_canvas_only.canvas_dry_run_upload: Preview upload without writing to Canvas.
07_canvas_only.canvas_skip_upload: Grade and generate reports, but skip Canvas upload.
07_canvas_only.canvas_overwrite_grades: Overwrite grades already present in Canvas.
07_canvas_only.canvas_student_slice: Optional Python slice such as 0:45 or 45:90 for batch division.
07_canvas_only.regenerate_excel: Regenerate output files from existing results.json.
